sso_rules_report.source_file: TR901_安路科技PH1A系列 FPGA SSO限制规则说明.pdf
sso_rules_report.source_path: data/raw/fpga/anlogic_ph1a/TR901_安路科技PH1A系列 FPGA SSO限制规则说明.pdf

notes: Bank0 主要分布配置相关 I/O
Dedicated clock pins support differential and single-ended inputs; single-ended clocks only enter the global clock network through the P-side pin.
Internal logic can drive BUFG, but clock quality is not controlled and should be reviewed before sign-off.
PH1A60 does not include SerDes clock regions.

weighted_sum_rule.mixed_setting_weighting: Each output contributes 1 / limit_per_pair for its own VCCIO, standard, drive strength, and slew setting.

mitigations: Use bank power isolation, careful PCB design, and adequate decoupling on VCCIO rails.
Add pull-up protection on noise-sensitive signals such as PROGRAMN.
Reduce simultaneous startup switching by delaying output enable after configuration.
notes: SSO calculation applies only to single-ended output signals.
For mixed drive or slew settings in one bank, sum the per-output weights 1/limit_per_pair and keep the total no greater than the bank VCCIO/GND pair count.

mipi_and_hardware.source_path: data/raw/fpga/anlogic_ph1a/UG907_安路科技PH1A系列FPGA 硬件设计指南.pdf

notes: bank0 主要分布配置相关 I/O
Dedicated clock pins support differential and single-ended inputs; single-ended clocks only enter the global clock network through the P-side pin.
Internal logic can drive BUFG, but clock quality is not controlled and should be reviewed before sign-off.
Right-half upper clock regions include SerDes clocking resources and can source high-speed interface clocks.

weighted_sum_rule.mixed_setting_weighting: Each output contributes 1 / limit_per_pair for its own VCCIO, standard, drive strength, and slew setting.

mitigations: Use bank power isolation, careful PCB design, and adequate decoupling on VCCIO rails.
Add pull-up protection on noise-sensitive signals such as PROGRAMN.
Reduce simultaneous startup switching by delaying output enable after configuration.
notes: SSO calculation applies only to single-ended output signals.
For mixed drive or slew settings in one bank, sum the per-output weights 1/limit_per_pair and keep the total no greater than the bank VCCIO/GND pair count.
UG915 confirms DDR3/DDR4 support for PH1A90/PH1A180/PH1A400 families; exact package-bank ownership should still be frozen in TD IO planning.
UG921 explicitly documents 2 MIPI DPHY-RX groups, each up to 1 clock lane + 4 data lanes.
UG909 documents bidirectional adjacent-DUAL refclk sharing on PH1A90/PH1A180.

mipi_and_hardware.source_file: UG907_安路科技PH1A系列FPGA 硬件设计指南.pdf
mipi_and_hardware.source_path: data/raw/fpga/anlogic_ph1a/UG907_安路科技PH1A系列FPGA 硬件设计指南.pdf

notes: Official product page provides user IO count, but the current local raw bundle does not contain a package-bank map for this package.
Dedicated clock pins support differential and single-ended inputs; single-ended clocks only enter the global clock network through the P-side pin.
Internal logic can drive BUFG, but clock quality is not controlled and should be reviewed before sign-off.
Right-half upper clock regions include SerDes clocking resources and can source high-speed interface clocks.

weighted_sum_rule.mixed_setting_weighting: Each output contributes 1 / limit_per_pair for its own VCCIO, standard, drive strength, and slew setting.

mitigations: Use bank power isolation, careful PCB design, and adequate decoupling on VCCIO rails.
Add pull-up protection on noise-sensitive signals such as PROGRAMN.
Reduce simultaneous startup switching by delaying output enable after configuration.
notes: SSO calculation applies only to single-ended output signals.
For mixed drive or slew settings in one bank, sum the per-output weights 1/limit_per_pair and keep the total no greater than the bank VCCIO/GND pair count.
TR901 publishes PH1A90 SBG484 and SEG324 bank budgets, but does not name SEG325 explicitly; reuse the PH1A90 per-pair limits only, and re-confirm bank-level budgets before schematic freeze.
UG915 confirms DDR3/DDR4 support for PH1A90/PH1A180/PH1A400 families; exact package-bank ownership should still be frozen in TD IO planning.
Current Chinese product page lists MIPI IO on this package, but the local raw hardware guide does not yet cover this package name.
UG909 documents bidirectional adjacent-DUAL refclk sharing on PH1A90/PH1A180.
Current local PCIe manual covers PH1A90SEG324 but not this package name; do not freeze PCIe ownership without package-specific confirmation.
Official locale pages disagree on some package-level parameters for this device.

notes: bank0 主要分布配置相关 I/O;HR 的两个单端 I/O 分布在 bank 的上端和下端
Dedicated clock pins support differential and single-ended inputs; single-ended clocks only enter the global clock network through the P-side pin.
Internal logic can drive BUFG, but clock quality is not controlled and should be reviewed before sign-off.
Right-half upper clock regions include SerDes clocking resources and can source high-speed interface clocks.

weighted_sum_rule.mixed_setting_weighting: Each output contributes 1 / limit_per_pair for its own VCCIO, standard, drive strength, and slew setting.

mitigations: Use bank power isolation, careful PCB design, and adequate decoupling on VCCIO rails.
Add pull-up protection on noise-sensitive signals such as PROGRAMN.
Reduce simultaneous startup switching by delaying output enable after configuration.
notes: SSO calculation applies only to single-ended output signals.
For mixed drive or slew settings in one bank, sum the per-output weights 1/limit_per_pair and keep the total no greater than the bank VCCIO/GND pair count.
UG907 validates DDR3/DDR4 placement on HPIO banks 31/32/33 and up to 72-bit width.
UG909 documents single-direction adjacent-DUAL refclk sharing on PH1A400.
